programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Tipster comes face-to-face with a familiar face, a repeat offender who remembers their last encounter all too well; K9 Murphy, a battle-tested German Shepherd with over a hundred deployments under his collar, is called in when a crash scene turns into a manhunt; meanwhile, K9 Murph tears into action, tracking down a suspect whose joyride breaks one too many laws; and K9 Guapo, arguably the most

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a v

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Along with FBI and Department of Correction agents, K-9 Eddie tracks down a suspect with an active warrant. Meanwhile, K-9 Jax hits the ground running, searching for a suspect accused of stealing a pickup truck. K-9 Dundee deploys in pursuit of a suspect who crashed a van straight into a fitness center, causing major damage. And despite a high-tech surveillance system in place, K-9 Koda is called

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After a father takes police on a high-speed chase with his toddler on board, K9 Keanu is deployed into a volatile standoff and every second counts. K9 Kyro tracks down the critical piece of evidence: a gun tossed by a fleeing suspect. programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Duke puts his elite agility on full display with a high-risk takedown that ends a lengthy standoff in seconds. Vegas PD pulls out all the stops to save one of their own, after a desperate suspect turns violent and attacks K9 Enzo. programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Shep and his handler became a nationwide sensation after their body cam footage went viral; K9 Robby steps aside, giving rookie K9 Seff the chance to step up and make the collar; K9 Jax and his handler are locked in a standoff with a suspect perched in a tree, refusing to come down and forcing deputies to wait him out for hours; K9 Mercury proves he's far more than a one-purpose narcotics dog w

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A Florida man and woman nearly get caught in the act by an officer on patrol. An officer in South Carolina gets outrun by a suspect, but he can't outrun a police canine. An inebriated man in Tallahassee offers his Hooters card as proof of identification.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? programme.title: Judge Judy

programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Romantic drama with Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu. David tries to make amends while a guarded Anna attempts to keep her distance and questions whether she's made the right choice.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the 'Box this time, Is It Cake, Too?, Hijack, Steph's Packed Lunch and Dr. Pimple Popper. As seen by Mo Gilligan, Jon Richardson, Gyles Brandreth, Melanie C and NDubz.

programme.title: UNTOLD: Inside Thailand's British Drug Mule Gangs
programme.desc: Tir Dhondy investigates the British gangs recruiting British women as drug mules to smuggle huge amounts of cannabis from party destination Thailand to the UK.

programme.title: Vengeance: Murder on the Heath
programme.desc: A tale of young love and ill-conceived revenge that goes terribly wrong. When two young friends fall for the same woman a deadly love triangle develops. Fact-based drama.

programme.title: Vengeance: Murder on the Heath

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm repaints Evan Drake's house while he's away and gives Rebecca the chance to peek at his bedroom, but things go awry when Drake returns home early.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray worries when the mother of one of Ally's friends flirts with him.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets annoyed with Ray when he seems pleased that she's picked one of her attractive friends to replace her if she dies.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier acts spontaneously when he realises that being single isn't all it's cracked up to be.

programme.desc: Frasier starts dating a model, but their busy schedules make it difficult for them to meet, leading his family to suspect that she isn't real.
